programs.title: The Patrick Star Show
programs.sub_title: The Patterfly Effect; A Space Affair to Remember
programs.desc: Patrick messes with the space-time continuum; while Cecil and Bunny celebrate their anniversary in outer space, Patrick and Squidina throw a house party.

programs.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programs.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick discover a surprising link to their favorite Kelpbed Kid; chaos ensues as everyone in Bikini Bottom starts meeping.

programs.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programs.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into a jailhouse after Plankton breaks the law; SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programs.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programs.sub_title: SpongeBob in RandomLand; SpongeBob's Bad Habit
programs.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply; SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he also can't figure out why.

programs.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programs.desc: The place where Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city; SpongeBob befriends a small storm cloud but has to protect it from a crazed weatherman.

programs.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programs.sub_title: Boss for a Day; The Goofy Newbie
programs.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab; Patrick takes a job at the Goofy Goober when he finds out the employees get free ice cream.
